title: Fresh music discs
description:
A full* rework of Minecraft’s music discs — new tracks, custom names, and a fresh jukebox experience.
Featuring original music by lowqualitygames.
body:
# Go support music author!!!
> **Find all the music by Artist here: https://linktr.ee/lowqualitygames**
> 
> **Donate here: https://gogetfunding.com/help-me-grow-with-my-music/**
> 
> **Download **_unreleased_** music here: https://buy.stripe.com/test_cNi3cv0BEaiwe4ibSUf7i01**
>  
> **Join our discord if you have any questions! https://discord.gg/EmAaqdWz**

## What it does
**This resourcepack is basicly almost full rework*** **of Minecraft’s music discs — new tracks, custom names, and a fresh jukebox experience. Music is made by lowqualitygames.**
**_**BONUS: You may also hear this music randomly play throughout your gameplay!**_**
WARNING: it may show in game that the version is incompatible but if you downloaded the right one it actually is

_*Backround music is not fully done yet_

<details>
<summary>Here are the changes</summary>

- **13** – Sweet Home  
- **strad** – In Caves  
- **stal** – Playtime Is Not Over  
- **mall** – River  
- **mellohi** – Sunset  
- **11** – The Broken Music Box 
- **5** – Where Did Time Go   
- **ward** – Dancing With Jellyfish  
- **far** – Lava Errands  
- **wait** – Look At The Moon  
- **blocks** – Blocks  
- **cat** – Pixel Dog  
- **chirp** – Waterfall  
- **otherside** – Where’s My Pickaxe 
- **Creator** - Night Sky 
- **Creator (music box)** - Finding Place
- **pigstep** - Freefall
- **Precipice** - Thunder In Bowl
- **Relic** - Bouncing World
- **Tears** - Adventures
- **Lava Chicken** - Creative
- **Replaced 36 Minecraft backround music!_(menu, nether, end, swamp, creative)_**
</details>


## FAQ:
**Q: Does it work on older versions?**

_A: Music works on every version its supposed to, but authors only on 1.16-26.1.2_

**Q: Can i repost this to other platforms?**

_A: No, definitely not_

**Q: Can i make changes in this and then repost?**

_A: No, you can't even make changes just for yourself_

**Q: Where do i report bugs?**

_A: You can dm me on discord(player_3x)_

## WARNING
**1. Read the license before downloading**

**2. This is beta version**

**3. Song names and authors work in 1.16-26.1.2**

**4. Some songs may work **_ONLY_** in newer versions of Minecraft**
